feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Don’t Start Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: disasterzoneix

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: “Dick,” the name barely leaves his throat. Bruce isn’t sure if it’s a plea or a prayer. There’s no answer to his name, no rustle of fabric. Nothing. Still Bruce waits. -- or: Dick is late for family dinner

entry.title: The Audition
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 839Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: The Batfamily encounters their most earnest, tweet-fluttering fan yet. It’s a sparrow. No one is handling it well.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: No Man's Land
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,173Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 94

Summary: “Delegate of Gotham City!” The Chairman's façade of composure all but snapped into shards like frail glass. “Think through what you're about to—” “—Mr Wayne!—”“—over here!—”“—Mr Wayne!—”“—a brief comment—”“—any words—”“—your relationship with Batman!—”“—Mr Wayne!—” Bruce strode out the conference doors, all six bats in synchronised march. Without regard or even a cursory glance for those all but shrieking out his name. At his departure, some tried to follow, the rest turned their fangs and frenzy to Luthor. And he didn't have the bats at his side. He was fodder. The cameras cut just as the entire conference descended into pure chaos.   ....   Clark jolted in place as he felt a hand rest on his shoulder. Turning to look at the person it belonged to, John met his unmoored gaze with an apologetic one. “I'm sorry I ever doubted your boy toy.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 124,733Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

Author: AdmirableOcelet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,337Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn Under The Red Hood.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,242Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 10

Summary: One year post the Funeral of Jason Todd Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel's friendship is going strong. With the former Clown Princess of Crime now out of Arkham and attempting to return to Civilian Life. Elsewhere Tim Drake continues training under Bruce to take on the mantle of Robin, things take a dark turn though when a new foe taking up the name and mantle of the Red Hood appears on the streets of Gotham hunting down members of the Joker's gang as well as the local Drug Trade. Who is this mysterious new Vigilante and why does he seem to know Batman?

entry.title: "Thought You'd Like To See"
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: Bruce has come into possession of an unmarked USB from an anonymous sender. The note included with the device simply states “Red Hood and Nightwing in a compromising position - thought you’d like to see”.Bruce wasn’t prepared for what he saw on that tape - he watches all of it anyway. Grayson Gets Hooded JayDick (Bottom Dick) Week: Face Fucking/Leaked Sex Tape/ “Open Up For Me, Goldie.”

entry.title: Chapter 5; Heaven and Hades
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,476Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 1

Summary: The Dark Age was over, and now it was time to rebuild, the Batman that rose up from the ashes will restore Gotham, he will make it safe for everyone no matter what must be done, and no matter what monsters or rogues or demons had tried to bring Gotham back to what it was before, he would not allow them, he would face whatever was out there with no fear of the enemy, For Gotham, both of them.

entry.title: Too late
entry.summary:
Author: BlunderBee

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,785Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 88

Summary: The evidence is undeniable. Bruce Wayne has done something unforgivable. At least, that’s what everyone believes. By the time the truth comes out, Bruce has already spent months alone, abandoned by the people he loves most. The Batfamily returns to Wayne Manor ready to apologize. They’re too late. Or: Bruce dies, everyone gets traumatized, and then Jason Todd has a terrible idea involving a Lazarus Pit.

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: Undercoverweirdo6967

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,803Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 40

Summary: Tim Drake and Kon-El have managed to keep their relationship hidden for months, sneaking around behind Bruce’s back while the rest of the family remains blissfully unaware. But secrets never stay buried for long. As suspicious glances, careless slips, and undeniable clues begin piling up, Bruce starts putting the pieces together—and the fallout is anything but quiet. As the Batfamily descends into chaos over the revelation, Bruce finds himself distracted by another unexpected complication: Clark Kent seems to be getting far closer than usual, blurring lines neither of them are ready to acknowledge. Meanwhile, Gotham refuses to give anyone a break. With the Joker escaping Arkham yet again and tensions running high both at home and in the field, everyone’s already frayed nerves are pushed to their limits. Between family drama, dangerous villains, hidden feelings, and long-buried truths, chaos is inevitable.

entry.title: "An Undead Wedding Day,"
entry.summary:
Author: l0singmym_nd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,077Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Elliot was your average high school student. Bullying because of him being trans, and basically the parent in his house, because his parents are drug users and alcoholics. But when he and Tim Drake, son of Bruce Wayne, get partnered up to parent an egg child for their health class, Elliot has to learn to let people help once in a while, and Tim has to learn to trust. Will they? Won't they? Stay tuned!!

entry.title: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,293Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: The Batfamily finds the Batmobile parked in the cave, its occupants, Batman and Night's End, still inside, tangled together in rare, vulnerable sleep. Two hours of waiting, one impossible question, and the quiet understanding of what Bruce Wayne actually needs.

  • Episode: Batmobile Cuddle Incident
  • Humor
  • Light Angst with Happy Ending
  • No Smut
  • Canon-Typical Violence (mentioned)
  • Bruce Wayne Almost Died (mentioned)

entry.title: The Madness He Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Andromeda_Child

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,020Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: She is not something that happened to him. She is something he walked toward, eyes open, cape trailing, every careful rule he built himself on crumbling at the sound of her laugh. She blows up buildings and he pulls her from the rubble. She kisses him like a threat and he lets her. She is Gotham's worst joke and his best-kept secret, and somewhere between the rooftops and the wreckage, Bruce Wayne stopped pretending he wanted her to stop. A collection of one-shots. Dark. Electric. Occasionally tender in ways neither of them would admit to.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Colony Chats
entry.summary:
Author: LOngCAt_AtTheEndOfEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,131Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 30
